# Congress.gov API — Data Agreement

## Provider
Library of Congress

## URL
https://api.congress.gov/

## Terms of Service URL
https://api.congress.gov/ (terms on the API documentation page)

## License
Public Domain (US government data)

## Data We Collect
Congressional data including bills, resolutions, amendments, committee reports, member information, voting records, and legislative actions via the Congress.gov API.

## How We Use It
Legislative signal in DRM3 products. Congressional activity data provides regulatory and policy context. Used to track bills and legislative actions relevant to technology, finance, and data governance.

## Commercial Use
Yes. Public domain data with no restrictions on commercial use.

## Redistribution
Yes. Public domain data may be freely redistributed in any form.

## Attribution Required
No. Public domain data has no enforceable attribution requirement. Best practice: cite "Congress.gov, Library of Congress" as the data source.

## Rate Limits
- API key required (free, obtained via registration)
- Rate limits enforced per API key (specific limits documented in API docs)
- Reasonable use expected

## Key Restrictions
- Must register for a free API key
- API key must not be shared publicly
- No impersonation of Congress.gov or the Library of Congress

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
